info.title: MaintOps Laravel API Documentation
info.description:
Versioned API for MaintOps.

Authentication:
- Login returns a Laravel Sanctum personal access token.
- Protected endpoints require the Authorization: Bearer {token} header.
- Logout revokes the token used by the current request.
- Password recovery uses Laravel's password broker and revokes active Sanctum tokens after a reset.
- Authenticated users can request a short-lived signed service token for Realtime or Analytics.

Roles:
- The API uses Spatie Laravel Permission for role-based access control.
- Initial roles: super_admin, admin, workshop_manager, advisor, technician.
- The development seed creates admin@maint.test with the super_admin role.

Documentation:
- The OpenAPI specification is exported to public/api.json with php artisan scramble:export.
- /docs serves the exported file, so the documentation UI does not regenerate the spec on each request.
- /docs and /docs/api.json require a web login from an active super_admin user.
- Internal analytics initial sync endpoints use X-Operations-Service-Key and are intended for service-to-service reads.

get.description:
Returns audit records from newest to oldest.
Only users with the `super_admin` role can query this resource.
Business workflows can write aggregate events such as `user created`, `workshop updated`,
or `maintenance plan updated` with old and new snapshots.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Searches by event, auditable type, actor type, URL, IP address, or tags.

parameters.name: event
parameters.description: Filters by exact event. Examples: created, updated, deleted, user created, user updated.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Filters by the actor ID that executed the change.

parameters.name: auditable_type
parameters.description: Filters by audited resource morph class.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: Filters by partial registered URL match.

parameters.name: created_from
parameters.description: Filters audits created from this date, inclusive.

parameters.name: created_to
parameters.description: Filters audits created until this date, inclusive.

post.description:
Authenticates an active user by email and password. Returns a Sanctum
personal access token that must be sent in the Authorization header.

Queues a password reset email when the address belongs to an active user.
The public response is intentionally the same for unknown addresses.

Updates the password using the token sent by email and revokes existing
Sanctum personal access tokens so the user must log in again.

get.description: Returns the basic profile and roles assigned to the authenticated user.

patch.description: Stores the locale used for subsequent authenticated API responses.

post.description:
Issues a short-lived signed token for an external MaintOps service. The
caller must already be authenticated with Sanctum. The requested audience
decides which service can accept the token.
Revokes the Sanctum personal access token used by the current request.

get.description:
Returns the seeded vehicle system catalog used by operational modules.

Codes: `ENGINE`, `BRAKES`, `ELECTRICAL`, `COOLING`, `TRANSMISSION`, `FUEL`,
`HYDRAULIC`, `SUSPENSION`, `TIRES`, `BODYWORK`.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filters by partial match on code or name.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Filters by exact code. Values: ENGINE, BRAKES, ELECTRICAL, COOLING, TRANSMISSION, FUEL, HYDRAULIC, SUSPENSION, TIRES, BODYWORK.

get.description:
Downloads owner records as a localized Excel workbook. The workbook can be
used as exported data or as an import template.

200.description: Localized owners workbook in XLSX format.

Cache-Control.description: Prevents clients and intermediaries from caching exported owner data.

post.description:
Processes the first worksheet in a localized owners workbook. Empty rows
and repeated header rows are ignored. Invalid rows are reported without
stopping the rest of the import.

file.description: Owners XLSX or XLS workbook generated from the export template.

200.description: Owner import summary including per-row validation errors.

get.description: Returns registered vehicle owners managed outside the user account model.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filters by partial match on name, email, phone, or document number.

post.description: Creates a vehicle owner contact. Owners are domain records and do not sign in.

put.description: Updates an owner using the same required fields as create.

get.description: Downloads vehicle records as a localized Excel workbook.

200.description: Localized vehicles workbook in XLSX format.

post.description:
Processes the first worksheet in a vehicles workbook. Invalid rows are
reported without stopping the rest of the import.

file.description: Vehicles XLSX or XLS workbook generated from the export template.

200.description: Vehicle import summary including per-row validation errors.

get.description: Returns vehicles ordered from newest to oldest with their owner contact.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filters by partial match on plate, brand, model, color, or owner fields.

parameters.name: license_plate
parameters.description: Filters by partial match on license plate. The value is normalized to uppercase.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Filters by vehicle model or line.

parameters.name: created_from
parameters.description: Filters vehicles created on or after this date.

parameters.name: created_to
parameters.description: Filters vehicles created on or before this date.

post.description: Creates a vehicle attached to an active owner.

put.description: Updates vehicle data using the same required fields as create.

get.description: Downloads workshop records as a localized Excel workbook.

200.description: Localized workshops workbook in XLSX format.

post.description:
Processes the first worksheet in a workshops workbook. Invalid rows are
reported without stopping the rest of the import.

file.description: Workshops XLSX or XLS workbook generated from the export template.

200.description: Workshop import summary including per-row validation errors.

get.description: Returns workshops with their assigned manager and served vehicle systems.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filters by partial match on name, code, city, email, phone, or manager fields.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filters by partial match on workshop name.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Filters by partial match on internal workshop code.

parameters.name: manager_user_id
parameters.description: Filters by assigned manager user ID.

parameters.name: vehicle_system_id
parameters.description: Filters workshops that serve a vehicle system ID.

parameters.name: created_from
parameters.description: Filters workshops created on or after this date.

parameters.name: created_to
parameters.description: Filters workshops created on or before this date.

post.description: Creates a workshop and synchronizes the vehicle systems it serves.

put.description: Updates workshop data and replaces the served vehicle systems using the same required fields as create.

get.description:
Returns transactional dashboard data from Laravel: order counts by status, operational metrics,
today's schedules, and upcoming schedules. The response is scoped with the same role visibility
used by maintenance orders.

Returns cursor-paginated operational snapshots for Analytics to build its
read model before it starts consuming Redis Streams. Contact data,
documents and tokens are intentionally excluded.
Returns reusable or vehicle-specific tasks with their vehicle system.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filters by task, vehicle, or vehicle system fields.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Filters by partial internal code. The value is normalized to uppercase.

parameters.name: vehicle_id
parameters.description: Filters by vehicle ID. Accepts null, none, or unassigned for reusable tasks.

parameters.name: without_vehicle
parameters.description: When true, returns reusable tasks with no vehicle assignment.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filters by operational status. Values: created, scheduled, started, cancelled, completed, rejected.

parameters.name: estimated_duration_from
parameters.description: Filters tasks with estimated duration greater than or equal to these minutes.

parameters.name: estimated_duration_to
parameters.description: Filters tasks with estimated duration less than or equal to these minutes.

parameters.name: created_from
parameters.description: Filters tasks created on or after this date.

parameters.name: created_to
parameters.description: Filters tasks created on or before this date.

post.description: Creates a reusable task for a vehicle system or a vehicle-specific task.

put.description: Updates task catalog fields using the same required fields as create.

delete.description: Soft deletes a task catalog record.

get.description: Returns reusable maintenance plans with their active reusable tasks.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filters by plan fields or related task fields.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Filters by partial internal code. The value is normalized to uppercase.

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: Filters plans that contain a task ID.

parameters.name: recommended_interval_days_from
parameters.description: Filters plans with a day interval greater than or equal to the value.

parameters.name: recommended_interval_days_to
parameters.description: Filters plans with a day interval less than or equal to the value.

parameters.name: recommended_interval_km_from
parameters.description: Filters plans with a kilometer interval greater than or equal to the value.

parameters.name: recommended_interval_km_to
parameters.description: Filters plans with a kilometer interval less than or equal to the value.

parameters.name: created_from
parameters.description: Filters plans created on or after this date.

parameters.name: created_to
parameters.description: Filters plans created on or before this date.

post.description: Creates a reusable plan and syncs its active reusable task list.

put.description: Updates plan catalog fields and replaces the task list using the same required fields as create.

get.description:
Returns orders with their vehicle, owner, advisor, workshop, technician and items. System admins see
every order, advisors see every order, workshop managers see their workshop orders, and technicians
see their assigned orders.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filters by vehicle, owner, advisor, technician, or workshop fields.

parameters.name: workshop_id
parameters.description: Filters by workshop ID. Accepts null, none, or unassigned.

parameters.name: without_workshop
parameters.description: When true, returns orders without workshop assignment.

parameters.name: technician_id
parameters.description: Filters by technician user ID. Accepts null, none, or unassigned.

parameters.name: without_technician
parameters.description: When true, returns orders without technician assignment.

parameters.name: scheduled_from
parameters.description: Filters orders scheduled on or after this date.

parameters.name: scheduled_to
parameters.description: Filters orders scheduled on or before this date.

parameters.name: created_from
parameters.description: Filters orders created on or after this date.

parameters.name: created_to
parameters.description: Filters orders created on or before this date.

post.description: Creates an order in `created` status. When `advisor_id` is omitted, the authenticated user is used.

put.description: Updates the order status. Other fields are ignored by this endpoint.

get.description: Item visibility inherits the parent order scope.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filters by task, plan, or order vehicle plate.

parameters.name: maintenance_plan_id
parameters.description: Filters by maintenance plan ID. Accepts null, none, or unassigned.

parameters.name: without_plan
parameters.description: When true, returns items without a plan.

parameters.name: pending_owner_approval_from
parameters.description: Filters items sent for approval on or after this date.

parameters.name: pending_owner_approval_to
parameters.description: Filters items sent for approval on or before this date.

parameters.name: scheduled_from
parameters.description: Filters items scheduled on or after this date.

parameters.name: scheduled_to
parameters.description: Filters items scheduled on or before this date.

put.description: Updates the item status through the configured state machine.

get.description: Returns users visible to the authenticated user according to the role hierarchy.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filters by partial match on name, email, phone, or document number.

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: Filters by a visible role. Values: super_admin, admin, workshop_manager, advisor, technician.

parameters.name: workshop_id
parameters.description: Filters users assigned to a workshop as technicians. Accepts null, none, or unassigned.

parameters.name: without_workshop
parameters.description: When true, returns users without a workshop assignment.

post.description: Creates a user and assigns exactly one system role. Role assignment is limited by hierarchy.

get.description: Returns a user when the authenticated user is allowed to view that role.

put.description: Updates profile fields and replaces the user's role. The update request uses the same required fields as create.

delete.description: Soft deletes a user below the authenticated user's hierarchy. Users cannot delete themselves.

http.description: Bearer token issued by Laravel Sanctum.

errors.description: A detailed description of each field that failed validation.
